title: Dog and Cat Remember Oden
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on dog and cat remember oden within the Dog and Cat Remember Oden storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We have been eagerly awaiting your arrival.

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.text: I swear to the gods above, I know no raizou!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: If someone of that name happens to be here, I'll slice my own belly open!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Oi. Wait just a bloody sec.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: It would have been reduced to rubble!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Forgive us for keeping it a secret from you all.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: We and the Kougetsu clan of the Wano Kingdom have been as family for longer than I care to say.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Even if it meant our kingdom's demise...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: We'd never rat out one of our friends to the enemy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: A shocking truth! Hidden bonds hold steadfast!

summary: Dog and Cat Remember Oden: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
